privileged_info_summary: The task requires login credentials (admin/adminpass123) to access the Aerobridge Django admin panel at http://localhost:8000/admin/. The task dynamically selects a random aircraft from the database during setup (setup_task.sh lines 49-62) with at least a manufacturer relationship, then creates a ground truth JSON file stored at /tmp/aircraft_ground_truth.json (line 99). The agent must navigate to Registry > Aircrafts to locate and compile a dossier about the selected aircraft including its model, mass, ICAO designator, registration mark, sub-category, status, manufacturer name, manufacturer country, type certificate ID, operator name, and operator country. The ground truth data is synthetically generated from the live Django ORM models in setup_task.sh, not from external data sources.
critical_finding: task.json file is INCOMPLETE and does not contain the 'metadata' section that should be present. The JSON file is truncated after the description field (1325 bytes) and ends with an unclosed string. This means no formal metadata claims exist in the task.json file to audit. All verified values above were extracted from the task description text and shell scripts, not from a proper metadata section.
